name: Grep Skill
description: Find candidate pages by searching page markdown files or the selected document scope.

tools.name: grep
tools.description: Find candidate pages by searching one target or the selected document scope.

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: A file path or a page directory. Leave empty or use scope/selected_scope to search all selected documents.

parameters.name: max_total_hits
parameters.description: Maximum hits across the selected scope.

parameters.name: max_hits_per_document
parameters.description: Maximum hits per document in scope mode.
